#  Assign an RFI to Bid Room Team Member in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. After an RFI is posted, you can assign an RFI to a member of the Bid Room Team.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * When an RFI is assigned to an individual, only that individual can post an answer to that RFI.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to manage RFIs for.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click the RFI you want to assign to a member of the Bid Room Team.
  4. Click the **Assign to** drop-down menu.  
  
![Assign Rfi To](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8dfcd1f829a62b42e633660b1ef9b37a/51c972803801a881bd8e9ba2fc895b47/assign-rfi-to.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Select the assignee from the list.  
_Note:_ The selected assignee will receive an email notification that they have been assigned to an RFI.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Submit an RFI for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/submit-an-rfi-for-a-portfolio-financials-project)
  * [Post an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/post-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
